expectations.text: Used the ✨ emoji (acceptable: a feat alternate such as 🏗️).
Included a body (multi-file change over ~10 lines) explaining the why, separated from the subject by a blank line.
expectations.evidence: Body present, blank-line separated, explains TTL cache + config keys (3 files / 31 lines).

expectations.text: Subject is imperative, no trailing period, ≤72 chars.
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Add in-memory TTL cache layer' (30 chars ≤72), imperative, no period.

expectations.text: Committed the change on the non-main branch (feat/cache-layer).
expectations.evidence: git log commit c7dd321 on branch feat/cache-layer.
